name: Development feature: Today Agenda synchronization
description: Create an event in today's calendar column, verify it appears in Today Agenda, open it from the agenda, and clean it up.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click the Sign In button and wait for the dashboard to load
Click + Add Event once and set its date to today with a late free time
Type TS Today Agenda Event into the title field, select Meeting in Kategori, and click Simpan Event
Wait for the calendar and Today Agenda panel to refresh
Verify the Today Agenda panel shows TS Today Agenda Event with its time range and category indicator
Verify the Today Agenda event count includes the newly created event
Click the exact TS Today Agenda Event row in the Today Agenda panel, not its calendar duplicate
Verify the event edit dialog opens with title TS Today Agenda Event
Click Hapus and confirm the browser deletion prompt
Verify the deleted-event undo banner appears, confirming cleanup
